baselines.notes: 28/30 prompts passed. Stable across runs (was 93.3% previously).
19/20 prompts passed. Minor regression from 100% — likely model variance on edge-case tool call. Min floor lowered to 80% to accommodate natural variance.
21/25 prompts passed. Stable across runs (was 84% previously).

5/25 prompts passed. Improved from 16% (4/25) with .containsText/.matchesRegex to 20% (5/25) with .containsAny scoring. The 2B model has fundamental limitations in image content recognition. Min floor kept at 10%.
